title: BIG BOOK ANNOUNCEMENT!!
excerpt: It's here! It's finally here! I'm so excited to share that my new book is now available on Amazon ! This is a dream come true for me, as it feels like it has been years in the making. There…
body:
It's here! It's finally here! I'm so excited to share that my new book is now available on Amazon! This is a dream come true for me, as it feels like it has been years in the making. 

There was something about the beginning of last year that actually made me take the plunge and dive right in to something I have been wanting to write for a very long time. I considered going the traditional route and trying to pitch and partner with a major publishing company, but then I learned that I could self-publish on Amazon and that was all it took for me to commit to the project. I wanted my book to be available to you all as fast as possible so by publishing on Amazon, it can be printed ON DEMAND and in your hands in a few short days. (Does that blow your mind a little bit?!)

If you're a longtime reader of my blog, then you are well aware that I am very passionate about cultivating a rich and fulfilling life, and sharing my experiences with all of you. From traveling the world to growing a family to working in various creative fields, I've developed an amazing life that has me excited to jump out of bed every morning (okay, almost every morning). But I haven't reached this point in my career and life without a few bumps along the way. Just like everyone else, I've made mistakes, I've experienced setbacks, and I've had to dust myself off and get back up again. However, when I really analyzed my life's trajectory, the one common denominator that has gotten me through the good and the bad has been using my creativity on a near daily basis. Whether it was styling clothes for photo shoots or designing scrapbooking products or sharing videos on YouTube, I've found my life's purpose by creating.

Craft a Life You Love is broken down into five unique sections: Crafting the Soul, Crafting the Right Mindset, Crafting the Right Environment, Crafting Happiness Through Habits, and Crafting Your Way Back. Each section is filled with all of my best tips and tricks for infusing your life with creativity, fun, and intention paired with personal stories about my journey. Each chapter also features guided worksheets, hand-lettered quotes, and a generous margin so you can doodle on the pages while you read! My hope is that you feel inspired to make this your own.

I am SO excited beyond words to see where this journey takes all of us. Let's get those creative juices flowing together to make 2017 the best year yet. If you have any questions - please leave them in the comments and I will try my best to answer them in an upcoming post and video! XOXO!
